ddls:
CREATE TABLE "galaxies" (
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each galaxy */,
  "fLength" REAL /* Length of the galaxy */,
  "fWidth" REAL /* Width of the galaxy */,
  "fSize" REAL /* Size of the galaxy */,
  "fConc" REAL /* Concentration of the galaxy */,
  "fConcl" REAL /* Concentration of light within the galaxy */,
  "fAsym" REAL /* Asymmetry of the galaxy */,
  "fM3Long" REAL /* Third moment of the galaxy along its major axis */,
  "fM3Trans" REAL /* Third moment of the galaxy along its minor axis */,
  "fAlpha" REAL /* Angle of rotation of the galaxy */,
  "fDist" REAL /* Distance to the galaxy */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the galaxy (e.g., elliptical, spiral, irregular) */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Cosmological redshift of the galaxy */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Apparent magnitude of the galaxy */,
  "color_index" REAL /* Color index (e.g., B-V) of the galaxy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the galaxy record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxies_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES galaxy_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each galaxy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the galaxy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the galaxy type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the galaxy type */,
  "extended_description" TEXT /* Extended description or additional details about the galaxy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or areas of expertise of the researcher */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification event */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy being classified */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher performing the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the classification */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification (e.g., manual, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification (for manual classifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_classifications_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_classifications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., optical, infrared) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image (e.g., exposure time, filter used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_images_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., morphological, spectral) */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the feature value (e.g., kpc, mag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_features_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxy_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy the visualization belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 3D rendering, 2D plot) */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software or tool used to create the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_visualizations_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxy_visualizations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., public dataset, custom dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification event */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy being classified */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model performing the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was made */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for classification */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for classification (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_classifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_classifications_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, development) */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration project */,
  "collaborator_institutions" TEXT /* Institutions of other collaborators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the authors who contributed to the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_ids FOREIGN KEY ("author_ids") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_galaxy_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the galaxy discussed in the publication */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_galaxy_links_galaxy_id FOREIGN KEY ("galaxy_id") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_galaxy_links_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
